question: List the unique sub-districts that have recorded both a positive number of allopathic outpatient attendances and a positive count of BCG vaccines administered.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0 AND T3.BCG_VACCINE > 0;

question: List the unique sub-districts where the outpatient allopathic attendance is greater than 3952 and the number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 14.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 3952 AND T3.BCG_VACCINE > 14;

question: List the unique sub-districts where the outpatient attendance for allopathic services is greater than 4843 and the number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 3.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 4843 AND T3.BCG_VACCINE > 3;

question: List the unique sub-districts that have both recorded more than zero allopathic outpatient attendances and more than zero BCG vaccine administrations.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0.00000000000000000000 AND T3.BCG_VACCINE > 0.00000000000000000000

question: List the unique sub-districts where the outpatient allopathic attendance is greater than 3952 and the number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 14.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 3952.0000000000000000 AND T3.BCG_VACCINE > 14.0000000000000000

question: List the unique sub-districts where the outpatient allopathic attendance is greater than 4843 and the number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 3.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 4843.0000000000000000 AND T3.BCG_VACCINE > 3.0000000000000000

question: List the unique sub-district names, ordered alphabetically, for areas that have recorded more than zero allopathic outpatient attendances and more than zero BCG vaccines, ensuring that there is at least one distinct outpatient record and at least one distinct routine immunization record for each sub-district.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 0.00000000000000000000 AND T3.BCG_VACCINE > 0.00000000000000000000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.OUTPATIENT_ID) >= 1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT T3.IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ASC

question: List the unique sub-districts, sorted alphabetically, that have an outpatient allopathic attendance greater than 3,952 and more than 3 BCG vaccines administered, ensuring that each sub-district has at least one distinct time record for both outpatient services and child immunization.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 3952.0000000000000000 AND T3.BCG_VACCINE > 3.0000000000000000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.TIME_ID) >= 1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT T3.TIME_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ASC

question: List the unique sub-districts, ordered alphabetically, that have more than 4843 allopathic outpatient attendances and more than 14 BCG vaccines administered, ensuring that each sub-district is represented in at least one geography record for both outpatient services and child immunization.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 4843.0000000000000000 AND T3.BCG_VACCINE > 14.0000000000000000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID) >= 1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ASC

question: List the sub-districts for which either the allopathic outpatient attendance is greater than 5000 or the number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 1000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 5000 OR T3.BCG_VACCINE > 1000;

question: List the sub-districts located in the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' where either the allopathic outpatient attendance is greater than 5000 or the number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 1000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 5000 OR T3.BCG_VACCINE > 1000 AND T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands';

question: List the sub-districts located in the country of India where either the allopathic outpatient attendance is greater than 5000 or the number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 1000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 5000 OR T3.BCG_VACCINE > 1000 AND T1.COUNTRY = 'India';

question: List the sub-districts, ordered alphabetically, where either the allopathic outpatient attendance is greater than 5000 or the number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 1000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 5000 OR T3.BCG_VACCINE > 1000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ASC

question: List the sub-districts located in the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' where either the allopathic outpatient attendance is greater than 5000 or the BCG vaccine count is greater than 1000, grouped and ordered alphabetically by the sub-district name.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 5000 OR T3.BCG_VACCINE > 1000 AND T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ASC

question: List the sub-districts, ordered alphabetically, for rural areas where either the allopathic outpatient attendance is greater than 5000 or the BCG vaccine count is greater than 1000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC > 5000 OR T3.BCG_VACCINE > 1000 AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ASC

question: List the sub-districts, ordered alphabetically, where either the total allopathic outpatient attendance is greater than 5000 or the total number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 1000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 5000 OR SUM(T3.BCG_VACCINE) > 1000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ASC

question: List the sub-districts located in the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' where either the total outpatient allopathic attendance exceeds 5000 or the total number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 1000, and display the results in ascending order of the sub-district names.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 5000 OR SUM(T3.BCG_VACCINE) > 1000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ASC

question: List the sub-districts located in rural areas where either the total allopathic outpatient attendance is greater than 5000 or the total number of BCG vaccines administered is greater than 1000, and sort the results alphabetically by sub-district.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) > 5000 OR SUM(T3.BCG_VACCINE) > 1000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ASC

question: List each sub-district and the total outpatient attendance for allopathic services in the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands', ordered from the highest to the lowest total attendance.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: List each sub-district and the total outpatient attendance for allopathic services, specifically for areas categorized as 'Rural', and order the results from the highest to the lowest total attendance.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: For the district of 'Nicobars', list each sub-district and the total sum of allopathic outpatient attendance, sorted by the total attendance in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT = 'Nicobars' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: List the sub-district and the total outpatient attendance for allopathic services for each sub-district located in rural areas, and order the results by the total attendance in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: List the sub-district and the total sum of allopathic outpatient attendance for each sub-district in the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands', ordered from the highest to the lowest attendance.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: For the district of 'Nicobars' in the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands', list each sub-district and the total sum of allopathic outpatient attendance, grouped by sub-district and ordered from the highest to lowest attendance.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT = 'Nicobars' AND T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: For the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' and areas categorized as 'Rural', list each sub-district and the total sum of allopathic outpatient attendance, sorted from the highest to the lowest attendance.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_OUTPATIENT_SERVICES AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.OUTPATIENT_ATTENDANCE_ALLOPATHIC) DESC

question: List the sub-district and the total number of BCG vaccines for the top 5 sub-districts located in rural areas of the Andaman And Nicobar Islands, ordered by the sum of BCG vaccines in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the sub-district and the total number of BCG vaccines for the top 5 sub-districts located in urban areas within the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands', ordered by the sum of BCG vaccines in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the sub-district and the total sum of BCG vaccines for each sub-district located in rural areas of India, showing only the top 5 sub-districts with the highest total vaccines.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY = 'India' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the sub-district and the total sum of BCG vaccines for each sub-district located in rural areas of India, and show only the top 5 sub-districts with the highest vaccine counts.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY = 'India' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the sub-district names and the total number of BCG vaccines for rural areas within the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands', grouped by each sub-district, where the total number of BCG vaccines is greater than zero, and show only the top 5 sub-districts with the highest totals.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) AS TOTAL_BCG FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) > 0 ORDER BY TOTAL_BCG DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the sub-district and the total number of BCG vaccines for rural areas in the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands', grouped by sub-district, where the total number of BCG vaccines is greater than 3; show only the top 5 sub-districts ranked by the total number of BCG vaccines in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) AS TOTAL_BCG FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) > 3 ORDER BY TOTAL_BCG DESC LIMIT 5

question: For the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' and areas categorized as 'Rural', list each sub-district and the total number of BCG vaccines, focusing only on those sub-districts where the total BCG count is greater than 14, and display the top 5 results ordered by the total BCG count in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) AS TOTAL_BCG FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.BCG_VACCINE) > 14 ORDER BY TOTAL_BCG DESC LIMIT 5

question: List the sub-district, the year, and the month for records where the number of measles rubella MCV 1st doses administered to children aged 9 to 11 months is greater than 500.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT, T3.YEAR, T3.MONTH FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS > 500

question: List the sub-district, the year, and the month for records in India where the number of first doses of Measles-Rubella (MCV) given to children aged 9 to 11 months is greater than 500.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT, T3.YEAR, T3.MONTH FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS > 500 AND T2.COUNTRY = 'India'

question: List the sub-district, the year, and the month for records where the type of area is 'Urban' and the number of measles rubella MCV 1st doses for children aged 9 to 11 months is greater than 500.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT, T3.YEAR, T3.MONTH FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS > 500 AND T2.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban'

question: List the sub-district, the year, and the month for records where the first dose of Measles-Rubella (MCV) for infants aged 9 to 11 months is greater than zero, grouped by sub-district, year, and month, and filter for groups where the total sum of these doses exceeds 1.0, ordering the results by year in descending order and then month in ascending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T2.YEAR, T2.MONTH FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS > 0.00000000000000000000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T2.YEAR, T2.MONTH HAVING SUM(T3.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS) > 1.00000000000000000000 ORDER BY T2.YEAR DESC, T2.MONTH ASC

question: List the sub-district, the year, and the month for records where the first dose of Measles-Rubella (MCV) for infants aged 9 to 11 months is greater than 1.0, grouped by sub-district, year, and month, and only including groups where the total sum of these first doses exceeds 8.0, ordered by year in descending order and month in ascending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T2.YEAR, T2.MONTH FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS > 1.00000000000000000000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T2.YEAR, T2.MONTH HAVING SUM(T3.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS) > 8.0000000000000000 ORDER BY T2.YEAR DESC, T2.MONTH ASC

question: List the sub-district, the year, and the month for records where the first dose of Measles Rubella (MCV) for children aged 9 to 11 months is greater than 8, grouped by sub-district, year, and month, filtering for groups where the total sum of these doses exceeds 16, and sorting the results by year in descending order and then by month in ascending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T2.YEAR, T2.MONTH FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS > 8.0000000000000000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T2.YEAR, T2.MONTH HAVING SUM(T3.MEASLES_RUBELLA_MCV_1ST_DOSE_9_11_MONTHS) > 16.0000000000000000 ORDER BY T2.YEAR DESC, T2.MONTH ASC

question: For rural areas within the state of Andaman And Nicobar Islands, list the sub-district names, the number of pregnant women registered for ANC, and the number of pregnant women who received 4 or more ANC checkups.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC, T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: For the district of 'Nicobars' and rural areas, list the sub-district names, the number of pregnant women registered for ANC, and the count of pregnant women who received 4 or more ANC checkups.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC, T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT = 'Nicobars' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: For rural areas within the 'Great Nicobar' sub-district, list the sub-district name, the number of pregnant women registered for ANC, and the number of pregnant women who received 4 or more ANC checkups.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC, T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.SUB_DISTRICT = 'Great Nicobar' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: For rural areas in the state of Andaman And Nicobar Islands, list each sub-district along with the total number of pregnant women registered for ANC and the total number of pregnant women who received 4 or more ANC checkups, sorted by the total number of registered women in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC), SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) DESC

question: For urban areas in the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands', list each sub-district along with the total number of pregnant women registered for ANC and the total number of pregnant women who received 4 or more ANC checkups, sorted by the total number of registered women in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC), SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) DESC

question: For the district of 'Nicobars' and areas classified as 'Rural', list each sub-district along with the total number of pregnant women registered for ANC and the total number of pregnant women who received 4 or more ANC checkups, sorted by the total number of registered women in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC), SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT = 'Nicobars' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) DESC

question: For rural areas within the state of Andaman And Nicobar Islands, list each sub-district along with the total number of pregnant women registered for ANC and the total number of pregnant women who received 4 or more ANC checkups, filtering for sub-districts where the total registered count is greater than zero and ordering the results by the total number of registered pregnant women in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC), SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) > 0.00000000000000000000 ORDER BY SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) DESC

question: For rural areas within the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands', list each sub-district along with the total number of pregnant women registered for ANC and the total number of pregnant women who received 4 or more ANC checkups, filtering for sub-districts where the total number of pregnant women registered for ANC is greater than 5, and sorting the results by the total registrations in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC), SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) > 5.0000000000000000 ORDER BY SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) DESC

question: For rural areas within the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands', list each sub-district along with the total number of pregnant women registered for ANC and the total number of pregnant women who received 4 or more ANC checkups, filtering for sub-districts where the total number of registered pregnant women is greater than 10 and ordering the results by that total in descending order.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC), SUM(T2.PREGNANCY_WOMEN_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_REGISTRATION_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) > 10.0000000000000000 ORDER BY SUM(T2.PREGNANT_WOMEN_REGISTERED_FOR_ANC) DESC

question: List the sub-district and the type of area for all records where the number of condom pieces distributed is greater than 5000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED > 5000;

question: List the sub-district and the type of area for locations in India where the number of condom pieces distributed is greater than 5000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED > 5000 AND T1.COUNTRY = 'India';

question: List the sub-district and the type of area for all records where the type of area is 'Rural' and the number of condom pieces distributed is greater than 5000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED > 5000 AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural';

question: List the sub-district and the type of area for all locations where the total sum of condom pieces distributed is greater than 5000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) > 5000;

question: For locations in the country of 'India', list each sub-district and its corresponding type of area where the total sum of condom pieces distributed exceeds 5000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY = 'India' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) > 5000;

question: List the sub-district and the type of area for locations in the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' where the total number of condom pieces distributed exceeds 5000, grouped by both sub-district and area type.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) > 5000;

question: For the state of 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' and areas categorized as 'Rural', list the sub-district and the type of area where the total sum of condom pieces distributed is greater than 5000.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) > 5000;
